data.name: Love x Time
data.detailed_description:
About new game - «Love x Time»


“Love x Time” is a visual novel with hentai elements. An exciting journey through time and space awaits you. Adventure can be dangerous and funny, soft and intoxicating, but always pleasant. Capture the hearts of hot girls and get the long awaited ending. Making the right choice and successfully passing tests will make your path easier. And don't forget, your decisions have consequences...



What will you get from the game:


  • Mini-games are ready to test your speed, alertness and endurance.

  • Unique stories for each girl.

  • Beautiful graphics and design.

  • Unobtrusive music and colorful illustrations.

  • An opportunity to relax and have a great time.

Artist's Twitter - AwayFuton3

data.short_description: "Love x Time" is a unique hentai novel with lots of hot girls! Here you can feel like a hero of different events and eras! You will get incredible pleasure from the game and its gameplay!
data.supported_languages: 英文, 俄文, 簡體中文, 韓文, 日文

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i3 Series or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: WINDOWS® 10
  • 處理器: Intel® Core™ i5 Series or better
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: NVIDIA® GeForce® GTX 500 Series or AMD Radeon™ HD6000 Series (VRAM 1GB) or better
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: DirectSound (DirectX® 9.0c)
  • 備註: This requirements are not final
